name: Minor & Jester, P.C.

websiteQuality.rationale: Modern Justia-built site on HTTPS with a responsive viewport meta tag, keyword-rich title and meta description, JSON-LD LegalService schema with embedded client reviews, and a current 2026 copyright (content last modified 2026-05-20 per page metadata). Clear phone CTA in the header, a labeled contact form, published email, LawPay online payment link, and strong trust signals (Best of Denton/Best of Denton County awards, Super Lawyers badge, 1917 founding legacy, chamber memberships). Deep local positioning with a named list of Denton County and DFW communities served. Only real gaps are the absence of online appointment booking and a somewhat generic template/meta description.

factors.mobileUsability: Responsive: 'width=device-width' viewport meta tag present; mobile navigation pattern from the Justia/Elevate platform.
factors.pageSpeed: Not directly measured (no lab tooling available). Inference: ~71 KB homepage HTML, 13 script tags, inline critical CSS (@layer critical), and WebP image variants suggest a reasonably optimized, professionally hosted site.
factors.accessibility: All 19 homepage images carry non-empty alt attributes; contact form fields have explicit (visually-hidden) labels; semantic h1 present. No obvious accessibility red flags observed.
factors.visualCredibility: Professional template with firm logo, attorney photos, awards references, and consistent branding; content updated as recently as May 2026.
factors.navigation: Clear top navigation: Attorney Profiles, Practice Areas (7 sub-pages), Client Reviews, Contact Us; footer links to sitemap, privacy, social profiles.
factors.contentClarity: Plain-language practice descriptions, attorney bios with education/background, and a detailed service-area locality list.
factors.callsToAction: Prominent 'Call Us Today - (940) 387-7585' messaging, clickable tel: link, 'Contact Us Now' form button, and LawPay 'pay online' link.
factors.contactFormQuality: Single short form (name, email, phone, message) with required-field marking, plus published email address and Texas-bar-compliant confidentiality warning.
factors.localPositioning: Strong: titles target 'Denton County' and 'Frisco'; site enumerates Denton County cities and surrounding counties served; Denton legacy/community involvement emphasized.
factors.trustSignals: Client review schema with 5-star ratings on-site, 'Best of Denton' (2012-2014 winner) and 'Best of Denton County' awards, Super Lawyers reference, founded-1917 legacy, Denton Chamber of Commerce / Denton Black Chamber / Keep Denton Beautiful memberships, Facebook and LinkedIn links.
factors.appointmentBooking: None observed - no scheduling widget; contact is via phone, form, or email only.

sources.supports: firm name, partners Jill Jester and Christopher Henry, founded by Fred Minor, practice areas list, phone (tel:+19403877585), Best of Denton awards
yearEstablished 1917 (Fred Minor), practice areas, chamber memberships, Best of Denton County awards

notes: Seed address corrected: the firm's own site (contact page + schema.org PostalAddress) lists 502 W Oak St #200, Denton, TX 76201, mailing address P.O. Box 280, Denton, TX 76202; no current source shows 515 S Carroll Blvd. Fax: (940) 808-0054. Homepage marketing copy says 'more than 70 years ago' while the About page states an explicit 1917 founding - 1917 used. Firm lineage: founded by Fred Minor (Texas House Speaker, per firm site), later Minor & Knight, now Minor & Jester, P.C.; Tom D. Jester, Jr. (joined 1967, former Denton mayor) practiced until his passing and is memorialized on the site. Jill Jester is the daughter of Tom Jester and has served on the Denton City Council since 2024. Site is built/hosted by Justia (Elevate); online payments via LawPay. No second office found.
